title: Hermitage Of The Heart
definition: The cultivation of an inner sanctuary or spiritual refuge, through the practice of mindfulness and unconditioned awareness.

difficulty_levels.beginner: Creating a peaceful, calm, and introspective space within oneself, through the practice of meditation and mindfulness.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The development of an inner refuge or sanctuary, accessed through continuous mindfulness and unconditioned awareness, regardless of external circumstances.
difficulty_levels.expert: A spiritual practice involving the cultivation of an inner sanctuary or hermitage, achieved through the unifying of one's consciousness with unborn, unconditioned awareness (nibbāna).

extra_fields.insight: The insight that one can create a personal spiritual refuge by continuously dwelling in the unborn, unconditioned awareness, regardless of external circumstances.
